title: Sleep for 5 seconds before pushing to registry in tests
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

We've some kind of timing issue going on with the push to a local repository test.  Adding a 5 second wait to see if the issue is cleared by that.

comments.body: Your efforts to defeat test flakes are being defeated by flakes setting up the tests. There's something funny about that.
OK, all green.  I'm going to close and reopen to see if this was luck or a potential work around.
@mheon had it failed or did my close/reopen not kick off a build?
@TomSweeneyRedHat it was green, but I kicked it again to get one more round of tests in. Seems good though.
I will hold my nose while saying LGTM

:pushpin: Commit 2fd4092 has been approved by `rhatdan`
